name: Problem framing
description: identifies object goal constraints assumptions and domain
evidence_of_learning: clear statement of what is being solved and why

name: Representation choice
description: selects and justifies a useful mathematical representation
evidence_of_learning: representation is appropriate and limitations are noted

name: Strategy explanation
evidence_of_learning: strategy is linked to structure not only template

name: Assumption checking
description: checks conditions domains and hidden requirements

name: Justification
evidence_of_learning: proof explanation verification or residual check is present

name: Reflection
description: connects task to transfer limitations or alternative strategies
